---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani<br/>"
subtitle: "<br/>Data Analyst | Neuroscientist<br/><br/><br/>"
format: html
css: theme.scss
toc: true
title-block-banner: "images/block-banner.jpeg"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
title-block-categories: true
page-layout: article
---



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Welcome to My Portfolio!**\ 
I am a statistical data analyst at the Erasmus University, combining my passion for neuroscience and pharmacology with expertise in data wrangling, analysis, visualization, and reporting using Quarto. 

My work focuses on deriving insights from complex datasets to support research and decision-making.

Explore my [Projects](projects.qmd) to see detailed examples of my work or visit the [About Me](about.qmd) page to learn more about my background and skills.
:::
